query:
-- Verificar distribution_log para Jhonata (id: 15122234)
SELECT 
  dl.id,
  dl.leadId,
  dl.corretorId,
  dl.tipo,
  dl.motivo,
  dl.createdAt,
  l.status as lead_status,
  l.corretorId as lead_corretor_atual
FROM distribution_log dl
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.id = dl.leadId
WHERE dl.corretorId = 15122234
ORDER BY dl.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
